programme.desc: Join the Club - The First Wives Club, the good-time battle-of-the-sexes satire sparked by snappy one-liners, great physical-comedy gags and three unforgettable stars in top form, Bette Midler, Goldie Hawn and Diane Keaton.

programme.title: Mrs. Winterbourne, (1996, Romance)
programme.desc: This fast-paced comedy follows the story of eighteen-year-old Connie Doyle an expectant mother with no money and an uncertain future.

programme.title: Apocalypse Now: Redux, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: This is the definitive version of Francis Ford Coppola's stunning vision of the heart of darkness in all of us, re-edited and re- mastered with 49 minutes of additional footage.

programme.title: The Boys From Brazil, (1978, Thriller)
programme.desc: A Nazi hunter in Paraguay discovers a sinister and bizarre plot to rekindle the Third Reich.

programme.title: Rolling Thunder, (1977, Action)
programme.desc: William Devane and Tommy Lee Jones star as two former P.O.W.s out for revenge in this neo-noir action-thriller that Quentin Tarantino cites as one of his favorite films. Written by genre masters Paul Schrader and Heywood Gould. John Flynn directs.

programme.title: Midnight Cowboy, (1969, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: This Academy Award-winning Best Picture stars Dustin Hoffman and Jon Voight in standout, Oscar-nominated performances as a con man and a Texas hustler trying to survive on the tough streets of New York. The legendary John Schlesinger directs.

programme.title: Lenny, (1974, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dustin Hoffman magnificently captures the complexities and contradictions of the legendary comedian Lenny Bruce's mercurial character.

programme.title: Annie Hall, (1977, Comedy)
programme.desc: Woody Allen is in prime form in this celebrated comedy and 1977 Best Picture Oscar®-winner in which he portrays a highly neurotic comedy writer who falls head-over-heels in love with a naive small-town girl (Diane Keaton) who aspires to be a singer.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Tops Speed
programme.desc: Zuzu and Yugo redline their Duel Runner in a high-stakes Turbo Duel with Sector Security! Can they outrun the long arm of the law, or will Security put the brakes on their escape?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Synchro Sector
programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals arrive in the Synchro Dimension, Sector Security is waiting for them with open arms… and cuffs! Can Yuya smooth things out before Sylvio and Celina put a wrinkle in his plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Super Duelists
programme.desc: It’s a superheroic showdown in the Synchro Dimension pitting Super Gong against his arch-nemesis, Dennis the Destroyer!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Scream for the Green
programme.desc: Dennis and Gong are in for the ride of their lives when they’re introduced to the turbo-charged world of underground motorcycle dueling!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dueling’s Most Wanted
programme.desc: The battle between Dashin’ Dennis and Sweet Baby Shay hits a speedbump when Sector Security pulls the plug on their Turbo Duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Showdown in the Slammer
programme.desc: Yuya learns the ins and outs of The Facility the hard way by coming face-to-face with the toughest and most dangerous duelist in the cell block: the Kingpin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Hero’s Fall
programme.desc: With his deck on the line, Yuya looks to rock the cell block and KO the Kingpin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Yuya is determined to do the impossible and escape from The Facility, but when friends become foes his plan to break out, breaks down!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fight for Freedom
programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals try to flee The Facility, their big breakout takes a terrible turn when their escape route leads them straight into the security guards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Match with the Master
programme.desc: The opening ceremonies of the Friendship Cup kick into overdrive as Yuya squares off against the Master of Faster - Jack Atlas!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Traits of a Traitor
programme.desc: With the Friendship Cup about to kick off, Yuya learns about tournament champion Jack’s rise to the Tops!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Crow’s Crew
programme.desc: The first duel of the Friendship Cup has the green light as Crow and Gong put the pedal to the metal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Riley’s Reveal
programme.desc: Riley’s been chosen to Turbo Duel Shinji, but the battle hits a speedbump when Yuya steps in to stop the duel and keep his pint-sized pal in one piece!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Common Cause
programme.desc: For Shinji to inspire the Commons to stand up to the Topsiders, he must first take down Moon Shadow! Can Shinji’s monsters swarm together and deliver the sting of defeat, or will Moon Shadow’s ninjas silence all the buzz?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Concerted Effort
programme.desc: Yuya’s friends are forced to face off in a duel where the loser is banished forever! No matter who wins, Yuya loses!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Gift of Grit
programme.desc: As the Friendship Cup picks up the pace, Jack Atlas takes a timeout to reveal the secrets of his past!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Duel Consequences
programme.desc: Officer 227 is in hot pursuit to take Yuya down - all the way down to the underground! Can Yuya outrun the long arm of the law, or does 227 have his number?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Turbotainers
programme.desc: Sylvio finally takes center stage at the Friendship Cup, but will he crash and burn under the spotlight?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Turning Point
programme.desc: An escapee from the underground brings word to Yuya on how to take control of the Friendship Cup!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Traitor Unmasked
programme.desc: Shay’s duel with Dennis turns into a battle of wits when he tries to force Dennis to reveal his dark secret.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Shay’s Revenge
programme.desc: After finding out that Dennis is from the Fusion Dimension, Shay sets his sights on getting revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Plans of Attack
programme.desc: Yuya and Roget reflect on their pasts to make plans for the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Con's Game
programme.desc: Zuzu goes deck-to-deck against Sergey – an ex-con who’s looking to “X” out the competition!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Rebel Road
programme.desc: Zuzu’s been hurt, but Yuya can’t race to her rescue until he defeats Shinji first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Road to Rebellion
programme.desc: Shinji’s Battlewasps are stinging Yuya to submission! But does Yuya have one last card that will tip the scales in his favor?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: Yuya’s newest ally is… Roget? Questions are raised that plunge Yuya's reputation into a freefall!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Birds
programme.desc: Crow and Shay soar down the track in a high-flying battle where the loser will crash land into the underground!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Warriors of the Air
programme.desc: Shay and Crow's winged warriors fight, claw and flap towards the finale…until an unexpected guest decides to join their duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Matter of Trust
programme.desc: Zuzu’s on the run from Sector Security, but can a little help from some little friends help her avoid big trouble?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Plan and a Promise: Part 1
programme.desc: The Friendship Cup heats up as Yugo and Celina tear through the tricky twists and turns of a transforming duel track!
programme.sub-title: A Plan and a Promise: Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Plan and a Promise: Part 2
programme.desc: Yugo’s in for a bumpy ride as he’s forced to zigzag his way across a duel track that’s been mapped for mayhem by Roget!
programme.sub-title: A Plan and a Promise: Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Furious over Celina's failure at the Friendship Cup, Roget sends a squad of Sector Security to seize her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Many Dimensions of Yuya
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Crow takes a turn for the worse when Roget takes control of Yuya’s mind!

programme.title: After two years of rigorous training, the new and improved Straw Hats make their way to Sabaody Archipelago, but their long-awaited reunion is spoiled by a villainous gang of imposters!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE BEGINNING OF THE NEW CHAPTER! THE STRAW HATS REUNITED!

programme.title: Luffy picks a fight with himself, Chopper falls in with a dubious crowd of imitation pirates, and Zorro causes a commotion when he falls asleep on the wrong ship!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: AN EXPLOSIVE SITUATION! LUFFY VS. FAKE LUFFY!

programme.title: Chopper struggles to make sense of the changes his "friends" have undergone in the last two years, and the Navy mobilizes in an attempt to stop the pirate posers. Will the real Straw Hats please stand up?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE NAVY HAS SET OUT! THE STRAW HATS IN DANGER!

programme.title: Chopper and Usopp flip over Franky's new body, Brook must choose between rock-n-roll stardom and the life of a pirate, and Luffy wanders into a very dangerous crowd!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: BIG GUNS ASSEMBLED! THE DANGER OF THE FAKE STRAW HATS!

programme.title: While the rest of the Straw Hats prepare to set sail, Luffy gets a chance to show off his new powers in a brutal throw down between notorious pirates, navy soldiers, and deadly Pacifistas!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE BATTLE IS ON! SHOW THEM WHAT YOU GOT FROM TRAINING!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew are finally reunited, but before they can set sail, they'll need help from Dark King Rayleigh, Boa Hancock, and all the friends they've made in the last two years!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: EVERYONE TOGETHER! LUFFY, SETTING OUT FOR THE NEW WORLD!

programme.title: As word of the Straw Hat resurrection spreads through the Navy, Luffy and his crew get acclimated to their underwater environment, and Franky reveals the startling identity of the man who protected their ship!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A SURPRISING FACT! THE MAN WHO GUARDED THE SUNNY!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are attacked by a rival gang of pirates, but that may be the least of their worries. Luffy and his crew are on a collision course with a cantankerous Kraken!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: DEADLY COMBAT UNDER THE SEA! THE DEMON OF THE OCEAN STRIKES!

programme.title: After their quarrel with the Kraken, the Straw Hats find themselves in hot water as Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji turn up missing, and the rest of the crew runs short on air!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: LOST IN THE DEEP SEA! THE STRAW HATS GET SEPARATED!

programme.title: Thanks to a little help from a friend, Luffy saves his mates from a ghost ship captained by a deranged Dutchman! Unfortunately, their happy reunion is cut short by a volcanic eruption! Can the Hats take the heat?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: UNDERSEA VOLCANIC ERUPTION! DRIFTING TO THE FISHMAN ISLAND!

programme.title: The Straw Hats finally make it to Fish-Man Island, but their reputation precedes them, leading to trouble with the New Fish-Man Pirates! Only a daring maneuver can get them out of hot water, but there's no guarantee they'll survive!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: LANDING AT THE FISHMAN ISLAND! BEAUTIFUL MERMAIDS!

programme.title: When Sanji gets up close and personal with a mesmerizing mermaid, his extreme fondness for the female form lands him in a life and death situation. Could the Straw Hat chef die from a nosebleed?!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: EXCITEMENT BLOW-OUT! SANJI'S LIFE UNDER THREAT!

programme.title: When Sanji gets up close and personal with a mesmerizing mermaid, his extreme fondness for the female form lands him in a life and death situation. Could the Straw Hat chef die from a nosebleed?!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE FISHMAN ISLAND WILL BE ANNIHILATED?! SHARLEY'S PROPHECY!

programme.title: After two generous donors save Sanji from death by nosebleed, Luffy and Usopp take a tour of the island. But their welcome is worn out when a mystic mermaid has a terrifying vision—that Fish-Man Island will be destroyed at the hands of a Straw Hat!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE KING OF THE FISHMAN ISLAND! NEPTUNE, THE GOD OF THE SEA!

programme.title: After reuniting with Nami, Luffy and the gang are invited to the royal palace of Neptune, god of the sea! Meanwhile, the New Fish-Man Pirates exploit the power of a designer steroid in order to terrorize humans!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE RYUGU PALACE! TAKEN BY THE SHARK THAT THEY SAVED!

programme.title: A trio of unsuspecting mermaids find themselves in hot water after releasing a bad guy from his barrel of a prison. Over at the royal palace, Luffy gets up close and personal with the Mermaid Princess!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A COWARD AND A CRYBABY! THE PRINCESS IN THE HARD SHELL TOWER!

programme.title: Luffy's lightning reflexes spare the Mermaid Princess from a grisly death, Neptune's army attempts to apprehend the Straw Hats, and Captain Vander Decken forges a sinister undersea alliance!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: IT'S AN EMERGENCY! THE RYUGU PALACE IS OCCUPIED!

programme.title: With their backs against the wall, the Straw Hats are forced to take King Neptune and his men hostage. On the other side of the palace, Luffy and the Mermaid Princess make plans to visit the Sea Forrest!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE RYUGU PALACE IN SHOCK! THE KIDNAPPING OF SHIRAHOSHI!

programme.title: Luffy accidentally "kidnaps" the Mermaid Princess, an old friend issues a grave warning to Chopper and Sanji, and the New Fish-Man Pirates prepare for a raid on Ryugu Palace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: HORDY'S ONSLAUGHT! THE RETALIATORY PLAN SET INTO MOTION!

programme.title: Captain Vander Decken and Hordy Jones manage to successfully breach the defenses of Ryugu Palace. Meanwhile, Jimbei waits patiently for Luffy to arrive at the Sea Forest.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE BATTLE IN RYUGU PALACE! ZORO VS. HORDY!

programme.title: Robin ventures into the forest in search of ancient secrets, Zoro takes to the water for a slicing, dicing showdown with Hordy Jones, and Luffy is branded a royal kidnapper by an angry mob of fish folk!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: KEEP SHIRAHOSHI SAFE! DECKEN CLOSE BEHIND!

programme.title: Luffy, Chopper, and Sanji are taken prisoner by a fish mob just as Vander Decken launches an attack the princess! Elsewhere, Zoro continues his battle with Hordy, and Nami hitches a ride on a mermaid to escape the crumbling palace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE STRAW HATS DEFEATED?! HORDY GAINS CONTROL OF THE RYUGU PALACE!

programme.title: Zoro and Neptune fight bravely, but they're no match for Hordy and his pill-popping minions. Back at the ship, Luffy reunites with Jimbei, who reveals something sinister about his past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE HAUNTING TIES! NAMI AND THE FISHMAN PIRATES!

programme.title: The New Fish-Man Pirates continue their bloody and violent uprising, and Jimbei begins the story of how he unleashed the monster known as Arlong on the unsuspecting citizens of the East Blue.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A HERO WHO FREED THE SLAVES! AN ADVENTURER TIGER!

programme.title: Jimbei continues his story with tales of fish-men taken as slaves, Queen Otohime's fierce devotion to her people, the legend of Fisher Tiger, and the sinister rise of Arlong.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: KIZARU APPEARS! A TRAP TO CATCH TIGER!

programme.title: Arlong's violent tendencies are condemned by Fisher Tiger, and the arrival of a young human girl teaches the Fish-Man Pirates a lesson in compassion.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Team is Formed! Save Chopper

programme.title: The great pirate Fisher Tiger keeps his promise to a young slave girl, but the adults in her village are determined to make him pay for his act of honor.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE DEATH OF THE HERO! A SHOCKING TRUTH OF TIGER!

programme.title: In the wake of Fisher Tiger's tragic death, the once-mighty Sun Pirates are splintered by an ongoing quarrel between Jimbei and Arlong. Meanwhile, Queen Otohime's ceasless quest to help her people begins to take its toll.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE SUN PIRATES SPLIT! JIMBEI VS. ARLONG!

programme.title: Tensions run high when a slave-owning Celestial Dragon washes up on Fish-Man Island. His former captives cry for out for blood, but Queen Otohime sees it as a chance to mend fences between the gilled and non-gilled!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: SHAKING FISHMAN ISLAND! A CELESTIAL DRAGON DRIFTS IN!

programme.title: After an agonizing absence, Queen Otohime returns to her people with exciting news. Unfortunately, a horrific act of violence derails the queen's mission and changes life on Fish-Man Island forever.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A SUDDEN TRAGEDY! A GUNSHOT SHUTS DOWN THE FUTURE!

programme.title: Jimbei reaches the heartbreaking conclusion in the story of Queen Otohime, Nami does something completely unexpected, and Hordy Jones makes a foreboding appearance!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: BACK TO THE PRESENT! HORDY MAKES A MOVE!

programme.title: Hordy announces his sinister plans for Fish-Man Island. Luffy and Shirahoshi are ready to fight, but Jimbei wants to wage this war on his own!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: THE KINGDOM IN SHOCK! AN ORDER TO EXECUTE NEPTUNE ISSUED!

programme.title: Luffy and Jimbei come to blows over how to handle Hordy's uprising. Back at the palace, Brook embarks on an out-of-body experience with hopes of saving his mates!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A RIFT OPENS UP! LUFFY VS. JIMBEI!

programme.title: The Covenant, (2006, Thriller)
programme.desc: To the students of the Spenser Academy, the Sons of Ipswich are the baddest boys on campus. But that's not all they share. The four friends also share a 300-year-old secret: they're warlocks, the teenage descendants of a 17th-century coven of witches.

programme.title: The Craft: Legacy, (2020, Thriller)
programme.desc: In Blumhouse's continuation of the cult hit The Craft, an eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments, (2013, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Clary's life is turned upside down when her mother is kidnapped and it's revealed that they are shadowhunters who are tasked with protecting the world from vampires, werewolves and demons. Clary must discover her talents and save her mother.

programme.title: Hollow Man, (2000, Sci-Fi Horror)
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Elisabeth Shue play former lovers who, along with a team of other scientists like themselves, discover the secret of invisibility. Rating: R

programme.title: The Host, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Hackers, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Tank Girl, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: In this laugh-a-minute, futuristic thriller, a mega-villain controls the world's water supply, and it's up to Tank Girl and her outrageous cohorts to end his greedy reign.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Big Jake, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: McLintock!, (1963, Western)
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: War Of The Wildcats, (1943, Western)
programme.desc: A confident oil baron and a determined cowboy are rivals for Oklahoma land and oil rights, and for the love of a pretty schoolteacher. The cowboy acts on behalf of the Indians, on whose land the oil is discovered.

programme.title: The Blazing Sun, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and pal Mike hunt bank robbers Al Bartlett and Trot Lucas. To throw off his pursuers, Bartlett kills his own twin brother and Lucas hoping that Gene and the Sheriff will believe him dead.

programme.title: Texans Never Cry, (1951, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry learns that a familyís money was used to buy counterfeit Mexican lottery tickets, and he has to track down the counterfeiters. Gene faces long odds when a killer comes to do away with him.

programme.title: Whirlwind, (1951, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry arrives in Red Bluff to work on the investigation of mail robberies. U.S. Bonds are stolen, and Smiley finds burned fragments of them. A henchman confesses who the guilty party is.

programme.title: Sabata, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman, (1978, Western)
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Disturbia, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Old School, (2003, Screwball)
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Ghost World, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: Hesher, (2010, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A young boy has lost his mother and is losing touch with his father.

programme.title: Disturbia, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: At the lowest point in their friendship, Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways; Carol returns to Alexandria, while Daryl stays on the road, each going into their own type of survival mode.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon learns that Mamoru has become a soldier of the Dark Kingdom. She decides to take on Queen Beryl in an effort to get Mamoru back, but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: To end her painful journey, Sailor Moon stabs Mamoru with the holy sword before turning it on herself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon must destroy Queen Metalia, who radiates a tremendously dark energy. The power of the Legendary Silver Crystal is finally released.
programme.sub-title: Act.14 Conclusion and Commencement - Petite Étrangere -

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: When Rei is abducted Usagi begins to doubt the identity of Chibi-Usa. Ami is challenged by a mysterious woman at the World Chess Conference.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to locate Ami and Rei. Seeing this, Mamoru's underclassman Ittou Asanuma demands to know Makoto's identity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Minako sneaks into a channeling session to communicate with people in other dimensions and learns the channeler is Calaveras the Medium!

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others decide to go to the 30th century, where Chibi-Usa came from. Waiting for them there is the solitary Guardian Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Mamoru's future self, King Endymion, appears before Sailor Moon and her friends. He reveals a shocking fact about Planet Earth in the future.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Captured by Dimande, Usagi loses her transformation powers. Meanwhile, Chibi-Usa feels helpless and goes to see Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi tries to escape the Black Moon Castle. She arrives at the 'Malefic Black Crystal' reactor, where she finds Dimande's younger brother Saphir.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others continue their search for Tuxedo Mask and Chibi-Usa. But Wiseman's covert maneuvers had already begun…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others are stunned to learn Chibi-Usa's real identity is Black Lady. And finally, Wiseman's own identity is revealed.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Upon contact with the 'Legendary Silver Crystals,' it was Sailor Pluto who saved the world from destruction.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Death Phantom radiates an enormous dark power. Sailor Moon and Sailor Chibi Moon take a stand and release the power of the 'Legendary Silver Crystal'.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends' peace is short-lived when a strange phenomenon that turns people into monsters begins plaguing the city.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa wanders into Tomoe Research Laboratory, where she finds a girl who appears to be sick.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls discuss the two mysterious figures they saw, who appeared to look like Sailor Guardians.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians defeat Eudial but, still suspicious of Mugen Academy, decide to check the place out again.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Haruka and Michiru are Sailor Uranus and Sailor Neptune, but they seem uninterested in working with the other Sailor Guardians.
programme.sub-title: Act.30 Infinity 4 Haruka & Michiru - Sailor Uranus & Sailor Neptune -

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians must stop a plant called Tellu from stealing the Hostes from humans.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Uranus, Neptune and Pluto appear before Sailor Moon and the other Guardians to reveal their true agenda.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Cyprine and Ptilol of the Witches 5 have placed the Sailor Guardians under a spell that causes them to turn against one another.
programme.sub-title: Act.33 Infinity 7 Transformation - Super Sailor Moon -

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Hotaru turns into Mistress 9 and takes Chibi-Usa’s Legendary Silver Crystal and her soul as well.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians fight their way through to find Hotaru, who is in possession of Chibi-Usa’s Silver Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Three Outer Guardians risk their lives to contain Master Pharaoh 90 within the Sankakusu Delta and halt his attempt to become one with the Earth.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: As Master Pharaoh 90’s power continues to grow, to protect her friends Super Sailor Moon decides to make the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: With Super Sailor Moon gone, the remaining Sailor Guardians must helplessly watch as Sailor Saturn brings an end to the world with her Silence Glaive.

programme.title: Sailor Moon R: The Movie
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the Sailor Guardians unite to save Earth from an alien force!

programme.title: Sailor Moon S: The Movie
programme.desc: Princess Snow Kaguya has a chilling plan to freeze Earth. Sailor Moon and her team are now the only hope!

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married Too?, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: While on vacation in the Bahamas, the unexpected arrival of one's ex-husband causes some longtime friends to examine the strength of their own marriages.

programme.title: The Single Moms Club, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Brought together by their children's potential expulsion from school, diverse single mothers (Nia Long, Amy Smart, Cocoa Brown) form a support group to help one another overcome life's challenges.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Soon after losing her job, a single mother takes her brood to Georgia for her father's funeral and meets his uproarious clan for the first time.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Family That Preys, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Secrets and scandals test the friendship of a wealthy socialite (Kathy Bates) and a working-class woman (Alfre Woodard), upsetting both their families.

programme.title: Safe, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A young girl whose memory holds a priceless numerical code, finds herself pursued. Coming to her aid is an ex-cage fighter whose life was destroyed by the gangsters on Mei's trail.

programme.title: Haywire, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: After a successful mission to free a Chinese hostage, a highly trained operative (Gina Carano) is betrayed and left for dead by someone in her own agency.

programme.title: Anna, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Beneath a woman's striking beauty lies a secret that will unleash her indelible strength and skill to become one of the most feared assassins on the planet.

programme.title: The Protégé, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Rescued as a child by the legendary assassin Moody, Anna is the world's most skilled contract killer. However, when Moody is brutally killed, she vows revenge for the man who taught her everything she knows.

programme.title: The Doorman, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A former soldier must save her niece and nephew from armed thieves planning to steal priceless art from a building in New York City.

programme.title: Almost Famous, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: A high-school boy is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone Magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies it on their concert tour.

programme.title: Mother's Day, (2016, Romance)
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty Woman comes a feel-good comedy about the intersecting lives of four families over a crazy week leading up to Mother's Day.

programme.title: About Adam, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: When carefree Lucy (Kate Hudson) finally meets her perfect man, Adam (Stuart Townsend), she's ready to give up her wild ways and settle down for good. But while Lucy is busy making plans for her wedding, Adam is busy charming the rest of her family!

programme.title: Almost Famous, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: A high-school boy is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone Magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies it on their concert tour.

programme.title: The Four Feathers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Harry Feversham is a soldier with a bright future - until he resigns from his regiment. Harry is branded a coward, disowned by his family, his fiancee and his best friend. After hearing his regiment is attacked, he set out on a journey of redemption.

programme.title: Mother's Day, (2016, Romance)
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty Woman comes a feel-good comedy about the intersecting lives of four families over a crazy week leading up to Mother's Day.

programme.title: Almost Famous, (2000, Drama)
programme.desc: A high-school boy is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone Magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies it on their concert tour.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary, (2004, Romance)
programme.desc: Single girl Bridget Jones decides to turn over a new page in her life, channeling her thoughts, opinions, and insecurities into a diary. It's instead a hilarious chronicle of her adventures in this modern-romance classic based on the bestseller.

programme.title: The Devil Is a Part-Timer!
programme.desc: Emi and Suzuno have some truly epic miscommunications; a new fast-food restaurant in town.

programme.title: The Devil Is a Part-Timer!
programme.desc: Rika goes with Emi and Suzuno to meet Maou; Maou tries to handle the loss of business caused by the opening of a new restaurant.

programme.title: The Devil Is a Part-Timer!
programme.desc: A busy day at the local amusement park with crowded restaurants, animals on the loose, scary ghosts and a much-needed swimwear intervention.
programme.sub-title: The Devil and the Hero Take a Break From the Daily Routine

programme.title: The Devil Is a Part-Timer!
programme.desc: A stranger has Suzuno reconsidering her position on the Devil.
programme.sub-title: The Hero Stays True to Her Convictions

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Lisa visits Rick while he recuperates in the hospital and Roy talks Minmei into visiting him as well; a brash Zentraedi pilot named Miriya learns of a human fighter pilot whose skill matches her own and leads an assault to find him.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Capt. Gloval receives an offer from Ontario Quadrant to take in all civilians of Macross City who wish to disembark, defying the Earth government's disavowal of their existence; an attack forces the SDF-1 to activate its new, untested defense system.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Following the disaster in Ontario, the SDF-1 receives orders to leave Earth or face consequences; the Zentraedi spies return to report on their experiences aboard the ship, further confusing the aliens as to the true nature of humans.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: The SDF-1's first movie, starring Minmei and Kyle, premieres aboard the ship and gives the Zentraedi more mistaken impressions; Rick awkwardly runs into Lisa, and when an attack forces the SDF-1 to transform, the two become trapped together.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Having enjoyed their time aboard the SDF-1, Bron, Rico and Konda convince a group of fellow Zentraedi to defect and join the humans; Khyron stages an unauthorized assault, which happens to coincide with a concert featuring Minmei.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: As the battle reaches Macross City, several of Khyron's troops disobey orders and seek asylum with the humans, leading the Zentraedi to believe the SDF-1 possesses a secret weapon.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: With the Zentraedi defectors inspiring a renewed hope for peace, Lisa returns to Earth on a secret mission to convince her father and the rest of the military to initiate negotiations; Miriya challenges Max to a game of skill.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Max stuns a battle-hungry Miriya by asking for her hand in marriage; the SDF-1 celebrates the first union between a human and a Zentraedi while a mutiny brews among the alien forces.

programme.title: Life Lessons with Uramichi Oniisan
programme.desc: The cast members of "Together With Maman" come to know two new employees of the company; Derekida asks Uramichi to bring these two, who usually don't attend company gatherings, to a year-end party.

programme.title: Life Lessons with Uramichi Oniisan
programme.desc: Now that the summer music video "Long, Hot Summer" is completed, the director tells the cast members of "Together With Maman" that they are going to shoot another music video.

programme.desc: 1970. A vida de um garoto que cresce durante a guerra em Jerusalém. Aos doze anos, sua mãe comete suicídio, mudando a vida da família para sempre. Após a tragédia, ele começa a trabalhar como escritor, participando ativamente da vida política do país. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Rei da Escócia, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Robert the Bruce é coroado rei da Escócia livre. Mas os ingleses estão determinados a recuperar seu território perdido. Batalha após batalha, Robert é derrotado e a nobreza lhe dá as costas. Entretanto, ele retorna para conquistar o que é seu. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Apenas Amigos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ao visitar sua cidade natal durante o Natal, um executivo fica cara a cara com sua antiga paixão do ensino médio, de quem era o melhor amigo - uma mulher cuja rejeição a ele o transformou em um mulherengo feroz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Doentes de Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O comediante paquistanês Kumail e a estudante de graduação Emily se apaixonam, mas encontram dificuldades quando suas culturas entram em conflito. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Garota em Chamas - Rebelião, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ela perdeu a memória ainda jovem, mas essas lembranças escondem segredos sombrios. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Jovens e Rebeldes, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Como a maioria dos adolescentes, Culain, Enica, Julian e Sego devem lidar com pressões de outros jovens, bullying, problemas com os pais e, claro, amores não correspondidos. Mas eles também vivem sob o domínio opressivo do Império Romano. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Perdido na Fama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Turk Henry, um baixista de uma banda mega-platina recentemente separada, leva sua esposa mimada para férias exóticas no Chile, mas ela é levada por um grupo de piratas que querem dinheiro para comprar um barco. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Radicão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tommy vem de uma família de skatistas, mas nunca conseguiu aprender a se equilibrar nas rodas. Quando um valentão da cidade o desafia para uma competição, a única esperança do adolescente é obter ajuda de seu cachorro skatista. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Relógio Encantado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angel é uma garota tímida que odeia dizer não. Ela encontra um relógio mágico que realiza desejos e a torna incrivelmente popular. Mas essa nova vida talvez não a deixe realmente feliz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Onde Fica o Paraíso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a II Guerra Mundial, uma pesquisadora durona e solitária abriga um menino fugindo dos bombardeios em Londres. Aos poucos, ela acaba por abrir seu coração em uma emocionante jornada de amizade e imaginação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Com Amor, Van Gogh, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um ano após o suicídio de Vincent Van Gogh, Armand Roulin parte para a cidade francesa de Arles e, junto às pessoas que conheceram Vincent, inicia uma investigação no intuito de decifrar se o artista realmente se matou. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Minha Vida de Cachorro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Nos anos 1950, Ingemar é enviado para parentes no interior da Suécia devido à doença de sua mãe. Inicialmente com dificuldades de adaptação e saudades da família, ele acaba vivendo experiências marcantes para toda sua vida. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Delicadeza do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma bela jovem perde o marido em um terrível acidente. Inconsolável, ela decide mergulhar de cabeça no trabalho, se dedicando de forma integral. No entanto, um beijo sem motivo aparente em um colega muda essa situação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma História Americana, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A violência do preconceito racial causa um boicote aos transportes por parte da comunidade negra nos anos 1950. Uma aristocrata decide, por conveniência, ajudar sua empregada, mas seu marido a proíbe. Essa imposição faz com que as duas se unam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filmelier TV, (2026)
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

Logo depois Juunin Makunba, um ninja criminoso e caçador de animais em extinção, atenta contra a vida de Tetsuzan. programme.title: 1988. Rei Yagyu é sequestrada pela Família dos Feiticeiro e o resgate exigido é a inscrição que revela Pako. Ryu pede ajuda a Toha e os dois traçam um plano para resgatá-la. programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E09

programme.title: 1988. Uma menina oferece uma estranha droga a Manabu e acaba deixando-o internado no hospital. Rei, Ryu e Toha investigam quem está por trás da venda desta droga e chegam a Kanin Dragon, um especialista em kung-fu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura

programme.title: 1988. A batalha de Jiraiya com o filho de Chang Kung Fu e Kanin Dragon continua. Reiha revela um misterioso poder cósmico. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura

programme.title: 1988. Bancos são roubados e uma única prova do crime intriga a polícia: cascos de bananas. Issamu e Joe Kazumi levam o caso a sério e tentam bolar um plano para atrair alguém aficcionado por bananas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E20

programme.title: 1988. Mais fugitivos do grupo de Resistência do Império Crisis caminham rumo à Terra. Desta vem quem aparece diante de Issamu e Joe é Célia, antiga namorada de Joe. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: Entre o Amor e a Amizade
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E21

programme.title: 1988. Passos inquietantes ecoam no deserto da morte. A Shadow Moon, o inimigo mais poderoso e imortal de todos, voltou. Shadow Moon faz um pacto obscuro com o General Jark. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E22

programme.title: 1988. Masao presencia um acidente envolvendo soldados do Império Crisis e eles deixam cair um controle remoto em formato de teclado que possui habilidades ocultas. Pessoas começam a ter a aparência modificada uma atrás da outra e Issamu estuda o caso. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E23

programme.title: 1988. O pai de Hakyo continua agindo de forma estranha... O plano de Gadorian para alimentar a Comunidade Camila, transformando-os em comida para monstros, que envolve o Monstro Kaima Lickpack, ativa a ira de Issamu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E24

programme.title: 1988. Maribaron volta para Crisis e recebe ordens expressas do Imperador Crisis. Bosgan recebe ordens específicas para capturar noivas cujo signo é de Escorpião. Bosgan chama o Guerreiro Kaima Gainakamakil e ambos vão ao encontro de Issamu para confrontá-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E25

programme.title: 1988. Bosgan, depois te perder para Robo Rider, volta com um trunfo em suas mãos: ele recebe uma nova espada chamada "Espada Kaima". Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E26

programme.title: 1988. Os planos de Crisis começam, de repente, a dar errado. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Habilidades Secretas De Chiyo - T01E22

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pai E Mãe - T01E23
programme.desc: 2007. A maior vantagem dos bonecos criados de humanos é que ele pode assumir o comando do jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo.consequentemente, o boneco do terceiro kazekage tem ahabilidade especial de converter chakra em poder magnético. programme.title: 2002. Luffy e o bando procuram uma forma de fugir de Concerto dos Símios, mas a Bruma do Arco-Íris é um labirinto sem fuga. Na costa, Nami, Chopper, e Sanji encaram uma vida de trabalhos forçados por não pagarem impostos! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Lembranças do Lar! O Cemitério Pirata Sem Fuga!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E06

programme.title: 2002. Nami adentra a bruma em missão para salvar seus companheiros e, talvez, caçar uns tesouros. O Prefeito a quer morta, mas o bando é protegido por um marinheiro misterioso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Um Confronto Inevitável! As Tramas de Wetton e a Torre do Arco-íris!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E07

programme.title: 2002. O confronto com o Prefeito Wetton chega a uma conclusão explosiva, quando os Chapéus de Palha partem para fugir da Bruma do Arco-Íris ou ficarem nela presos para sempre. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: E a Lenda tem Início! O Outro Lado do Arco-Íris!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E08

programme.title: 2002. Os Chapéus de Palha quase acabam mortos pela queda dos destroços de um navio de 200 anos de idade. Os boatos de uma ilha nos céus seriam verdadeiros? Luffy, Zoro e Sanji mergulham para descobrir! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: O Log é Roubado! O Rei das Recuperações, Masira!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E09

programme.title: 2002. Ainda em busca de uma rota para a ilha do céu, os Chapéus de Palha traçam o caminho para Jaya. Enquanto isso, Ace Punho de Fogo pega carona em um navio comandado por Buggy, o Palhaço! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Verdadeiros Monstros! Não Mexa com os Piratas do Barba Branca!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E10

programme.title: 2002. Os Chapéus de Palha ancoram em uma cidade tomada por marginais, e Nami faz os rapazes jurarem não se meter em encrenca. Mas quando Bellamy e seus piratas procuram briga, Luffy quebra a promessa! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Pare de Sonhar! Mock Town, a Cidade do Escárnio!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E11

programme.title: 2002. Nico Robin encontra um homem que pode conhecer o caminho para a Ilha do Céu. Luffy e seu bando só precisam sobreviver ao massacre dos símios que querem afundar o Going Merry! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Piratas Diferenciados! Um Homem que Fala de Sonhos e a Busca Pelo Rei Submarino!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E12

programme.title: 2002. Luffy e seu bando chegam ao lar de Montblanc Cricket: o homem com a chave para chegar à Ilha do Céu. Há apenas um pequeno problema - ele é herdeiro de uma distinta linhagem de lendários mentirosos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Família Lendária! Noland, o Mentiroso!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E13

programme.title: 2002. Montblanc Cricket aceita ajudar os Chapéus de Palha a chegar à Ilha do Céu, mas primeiro eles devem se aventurar nas profundezas mais sombrias de uma floresta infestada de aranhas para capturar um pássaro com um tenaz senso de direção. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Acelerem Para as Nuvens! Capturem o Pássaro do Sul!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E14

programme.title: 2002. Enquanto os Chapéus de Palha enfrentam criaturas da floresta em busca do Pássaro do Sul, Montblanc e seus símios são brutalmente atacados pelos Piratas de Bellamy! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Sonhos Não Se Realizam? Bellamy vs. A Aliança Saruyama!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E15

programme.title: 2002. Luffy deu a outra face em seu primeiro encontro com Bellamy, mas agora quer acertar as contas pelo velho Montblanc! Enquanto isso, um novo bando de piratas está de olho nos Chapéus de Palha! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: O Homem de 100 Milhões! O Maior Poder do Mundo e o Pirata Barba Negra!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E16

programme.title: 2002. Graças a modificações no Merry, os Chapéus de Palha seguem para a ilha do céu! Mas com o bando do Barba Negra em seu encalço, navegar a Corrente de Gancho não será trabalho fácil! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Rumo aos Céus! Peguem a Corrente de Gancho!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E17

programme.title: 2002. Alcançar o mar de nuvens foi tarefa fácil perto do trabalho de sobreviver a ele, quando criaturas do mar do céu atacam o Merry, Usopp quase se afoga e um estranho Cavaleiro do Céu dá um aviso aos Chapéus de Palha! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Naveguem o Mar Branco! O Cavaleiro do Céu e o Portão nas Nuvens!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E18

programme.title: 2003. Após uma carona em um elevador camarão, os Chapéus de Palha alcançam Skypiea! Os piratas, porém, ainda têm muito a aprender sobre o local, mas uma bela anjo se torna seu guia turístico. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Terra de Deus, Skypiea! Anjos em uma Praia de Nuvens!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E19

programme.title: 2003. A pressa de Nami em explorar o reino proibido do Jardim de Cima a coloca prestes a receber a Cólera de Deus, e o bando sofre o Julgamento do Céu por não pagar os impostos de imigração! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: O Solo Sagrado Proibido! A Ilha Onde Vive Deus e o Julgamento dos Céus!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E20

programme.title: 2003. Os Chapéus de Palha já sabem o que é viver do outro lado da lei, mas taxas de imigração não pagas e o ataque de Nami a um Boina Branca garantem a Luffy uma sentença de morte! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Já Criminosos?! Os Mantenedores da Lei de Skypiea!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E21

programme.title: 2003. Nami, Zoro, Chopper e Robin estão aprisionados a bordo do Going Merry! Luffy agora precisa salvá-los arriscando-se nos solos sagrados do Jardim de Cima! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Fuga é Possível?! O Desafio de Deus!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E22

programme.title: 2003. Conis ajuda Luffy e seus companheiros e iniciar sua missão de resgate, mas o Chapéu de Palha tem um pressentimento. A busca por respostas desperta a ira de Deus contra o bando! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Cilada na Rua Graciosa! O Todo Poderoso Enel!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E23

programme.title: 2003. Zoro confronta um Tubarão do Céu faminto às beiras do Altar de Sacrifício e Luffy, Usopp e Sanji tentam sobreviver a uma ilha que os quer mortos! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Avante, Corvo! Rumo ao Altar de Sacrifício!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E24

programme.title: 2003. Luffy, Sanji e Usopp combatem Satori e suas Nuvens Surpresa. O sacerdote usa seu mantra para deter os piratas e deixá-los sem rumo na Ilha de Deus. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Chance de Sobrevivência de 10%! Satori, o Mestre dos Mantras!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E25

programme.title: 2003. Usopp e Sanji tentam retomar o controle do Corvo, e Luffy combate os obstáculos das Nuvens Surpresa enquanto combate Satori! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Provação da Bola! Combate Desesperado na Floresta Perdida!

programme.title: 2003. A etapa egípcia do Campeonato do Mundo culmina com a partida final, destacando a Dinastia F contra a Revolução BBA. programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E20

programme.title: 2003. Tyson está sentindo a pressão de ser campeão do mundo. Apesar do aviso de Hiro, uma equipe de televisão o segue por um dia, gravando todos os seus movimentos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E21

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E19

programme.desc: Veteran polar bear guide Dennis Compayre watches as a mother bear teaches her young cubs to hunt and discovers how they are struggling to adapt to a rapidly warming Arctic.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: Success has little to do with performance; winners and losers are chosen by society; now, scientists have discovered the secret to predicting success.

programme.title: The Nature of Things

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: Like the invention of the television, the smartphone, and even the internet, autonomous cars look to change everything by making the world safer, greener and less stressful; asking what will be lost from the human experience in a driverless world.

programme.title: Tall, Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: As Valentines Day approaches, a successful real estate attorney finds her seemingly perfect match on a dating app. However, she soon realizes that the man is an impostor who stole the identity of his former roommate to insert himself into her life. Starring Jamie Bernadette, Matthew Pohlkamp, Michael Pare.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger whos smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasnt the only secret he failed to mention in his profile. Starring Stephanie Sy, Jacob Blair, Erik Athavale.

programme.title: Desire: A Temptations Story
programme.desc: Caught up in a whirlwind romance, inspirational talk-show host Kendra spontaneously marries the man of her dreams. However, once the honeymoon is over, revelations about her new husbands past lead her down a dangerous road. Starring Tasha Smith, Adrian Holmes, Millan Tesfazgi.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Afrikka Hardy in 2014 turns out to be a catalyst for the investigation that ultimately exposes the crimes committed by Darren Deon Vann.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: On August 26, 2011, Amanda Plasse becomes the victim of a brutal murder; it takes years before the culprit gets arrested and her mother also fights to pass a law that prevents unauthorized sharing of crime scene photos.

programme.title: An Hour to Kill
programme.desc: The police are searching for a murder suspect in the small town of Oakley, Kansas; Kelly is working in a bar the next town over when the suspect comes in for a drink; with the police on their way, she needs to keep the suspect from running.

programme.title: An Hour to Kill
programme.desc: Police discover the whereabouts of German backpacker Anne Neumann in Coober Pedy, Australia; ten other murder victims could be linked to her death, and police believe theyre on the hunt for a serial killer.

programme.title: An Hour to Kill
programme.desc: Rodney is murdered one night when he goes out to work a job unloading a truck; as the investigation into his death kicks off, the time he spent getting a tattoo leads to some important evidence in bringing his killers to justice.

programme.title: Emily
programme.desc: Emily Brontë struggles within the confines of her life, yearning for artistic and personal freedom. She finds romance before writing her seminal novel, "Wuthering Heights." Starring Emma Mackey, Fionn Whitehead, Oliver Jackson-Cohen.

programme.title: Acidman
programme.desc: Maggie tracks down her estranged father, Lloyd, now living in the Oregon wilderness and obsessed with UFOs. programme.desc: After the deadly siege in Waco, Texas, U.S. Army veteran Timothy McVeigh hatches a sinister plan to blow up the Alfred P. Murrah Federal Building in Oklahoma City. Starring Alfie Allen, Brett Gelman, Ashley Benson.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: The search for the diary of Alfred Rosenberg, credited with shaping Hitlers ideology, spans decades until FBI Agent Robert Wittman locates the 400-page handwritten manuscript, recovering a frightening window into history.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Carol Dennis is selected as a polygamous wife for a Mormon cult leader, it begins her long ordeal.

programme.title: Fake
programme.desc: Birdie uncovers Joes lies, but fakes her way through Anton and Toveys wedding; her fabrications grow more elaborate, even as she is faced with evidence disproving Joes story; when she edges to the singles table, Birdie lashes out at Margeaux.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: A shady singer lures a star-struck teen to a faraway island with promises of fame and fortune. But when it turns out to be a sex-trafficking ring, her desperate mother embarks on a daring crusade to save her. Starring Gina Holden, Mozart Dee, James William OHalloran.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A tragic discovery in an affluent Virginia neighborhood: a mother and daughter found dead in their home. At first, it seems like a murder-suicide, but as investigators dig deeper, unsettling clues emerge.

programme.title: Some Other Woman
programme.desc: Eve sees a strange woman watching her and her husband from outside their home. As the stranger slowly intrudes further into their lives, Eve begins to question if shes losing her mind or her husbands loyalty. Starring Tom Felton, Amanda Crew, Ashley Greene.

programme.title: Dream Horse
programme.desc: The true story of Dream Alliance, an unlikely racehorse bred by bartender Jan Vokes. With very little money and no experience, Jan convinces her neighbors to chip in their meager earnings to help raise Dream and compete with the racing elites. Starring Toni Collette, Damian Lewis, Owen Teale.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When a congregant is found in the church office bleeding from gunshot wounds to the head, police question the new pastor who leads the investigation to an ungodly discovery.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young mother is found brutally murdered in her home, her infant son left unharmed just feet away. With no forced entry and few clues, the case goes cold for decades, until groundbreaking DNA technology leads investigators to an unexpected answer.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Security footage gives police a different point of view than the one Lee Rodarte Jr. is presenting after 21-year-old Savannah Gold goes missing; interrogators must navigate restaurant romance while trying to find out exactly what happened.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A woman is reporting missing while visiting her boyfriend, Robert, in New Mexico; as Robert begins to explain the events that led to her disappearance, holes in his story bring the whole event into question.

programme.desc: A psychotic music producer kidnaps a cancelled RandB singer and her former co-star 15 years after they broke up. programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Jeff, Who Lives at Home (2011)
programme.desc: A 30-year-old slacker (Jason Segel) finds his true destiny while helping his brother (Ed Helms) stalk the latters possibly adulterous wife.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Tommy (Thom Mathews) meets masked-killer Jason, brought back by a lightning bolt at the lake.

programme.title: Wander (2020)
programme.desc: Hired to investigate a suspicious death in the town of Wander, a paranoid private eye with a troubled past becomes convinced the case is linked to the same conspiracy and cover-up that caused the death of his daughter.

programme.title: No Code of Conduct (1998)
programme.desc: Two policemen (Mark Dacascos, Charlie Sheen) learn that city leaders and law enforcement support heroin trafficking across the Mexican border.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Rush (2013)
programme.desc: Charismatic Englishman James Hunt (Chris Hemsworth) and Austrian perfectionist Niki Lauda (Daniel Bruhl) burn up the 1970s Formula 1 racing scene and share an intense rivalry on the track.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: What If (2013)
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend.

programme.title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.sub-title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.desc: Friends and lovers try to navigate their way through the complexities of modern relationships, sometimes misconstruing the true intentions of the opposite sex.

programme.title: The To Do List (2013)
programme.desc: Determined to shed her uptight image, a high-school valedictorian (Aubrey Plaza) decides to lose her virginity before college begins. Realizing that she is out of her depth, she asks friends and family for advice.

programme.title: Blue Eyed Girl (2025)
programme.desc: Summoned home to visit her two sisters and her ailing father, a woman starts to re-evaluate her life as she wonders what could have been.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and 40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: The Hours (2002)
programme.desc: The writings of Virginia Woolf (Nicole Kidman) affect a housewife (Julianne Moore) and emulate the life of a New Yorker (Meryl Streep) who is in love with a dying poet.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: The Queen (2006)
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II and Prime Minister Tony Blair try to reach a compromise in determining the royal familys public reaction to Princess Dianas death.

programme.title: Restoration (1995)
programme.desc: A hedonistic physician (Robert Downey Jr.) weds the kings (Sam Neill) lover but is not allowed to consummate the marriage in 17th-century England.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: The Hours (2002)
programme.desc: The writings of Virginia Woolf (Nicole Kidman) affect a housewife (Julianne Moore) and emulate the life of a New Yorker (Meryl Streep) who is in love with a dying poet.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: A rich teen asks an unpopular student to the senior prom, creating problems among their separate circles of friends.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renee Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Beautiful Girls (1996)
programme.desc: The opposite sex preoccupies working-class pals gathered for their high-school reunion in small-town Massachusetts.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian counts (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: The unspoilt wilderness of South Africas Eastern Cape coastline takes you back to when time was measured by the tides and little else mattered, except the lure of the myriad species to be found off the rocks and in the abundant estuaries.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The upper section of the Zambezi River, while difficult to get to, never fails to deliver a fantastic fishing experience. We go in search of Africas Piranha and come face to face with the business end of this freshwater monster.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: Few wilderness destinations compare to the mighty Zambezi, where ferocious tigerfish are found in crocodile infested waters. The Wildfly Team experience an incredible journey in amongst Africas wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef James cook their version of a rich Spanish Basque style stew.
